title: Resist Stun
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{ForcePower
|image=
|name=Resist Stun
|alternate=

'''Resist Stun''' was a [[Force power/Legends#Control|Control]]-based [[The Force/Legends|Force]] power. It allowed Force-users to resist the effects of being [[Stun/Legends|stunned]] by preparing themselves to resist the effects of stun-based weaponry before they were hit. Successful application of the Force power allowed the user to absorb the effects into their body to keep themselves from being temporarily paralyzed or knocked out.
